Welcome

HG Construction Inc

HG Construction Inc has been serving Miami and the surrounding region with premium general contractor services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Miami Trusts HG Construction Inc

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
